scripts.dev: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path apps/web/.next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/web/.next }" && node server.js
scripts.clean: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path apps/web/.next) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/web/.next }; if (Test-Path apps/web/out) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force apps/web/out }"
